abilities.name: Bedhead
abilities.text: As long as Snorlax is Asleep, your opponent's Active Pokemon is also Asleep, and this damage is dealt between turns.

abilities.name: Dozing
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Snorlax is your Active Pokemon, you may remove 2 damage counters from Snorlax. If you do, Snorlax is now Asleep.

tests.name: dozing_heals_and_sleeps
tests.description: Test that Dozing removes 2 damage counters and makes Snorlax Asleep

tests.name: dozing_effect_id
tests.description: Test that effect ID is correctly formatted

tests.name: bedhead_damage_constant
tests.description: Test that Bedhead damage constant is 20
